intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把规则结果、礼貌提醒和最后“愿意遵守”的语气读出来。

sentences.text: If you park your car in the wrong place, a traffic policeman will soon find it.
sentences.focus_zh: If you park 是条件；will soon find it 是结果，读出规则和后果的清楚关系。

sentences.text: You will be very lucky if he lets you go without a ticket.
sentences.focus_zh: without a ticket 在这里是没有停车罚单，不是没有车票。

sentences.text: Traffic police are sometimes very polite.
sentences.focus_zh: sometimes very polite 是故事反转的开关，语气要从处罚预期转向温和提醒。

sentences.text: Sir, we welcome you to our city.
sentences.focus_zh: Sir 和 welcome 是礼貌开头，读得友好、正式一点。
No Parking 是明确规则；礼貌不等于含糊。

sentences.text: You will enjoy your stay here if you pay attention to our street signs.
sentences.focus_zh: pay attention to our street signs 是温和提醒，will enjoy 是积极结果。

sentences.text: This note is only a reminder.
sentences.focus_zh: only a reminder 说明这不是惩罚，而是帮助你注意规则。

sentences.text: If you receive a request like this, you cannot fail to obey it!
sentences.focus_zh: cannot fail to obey it 表示一定会遵守，读出作者被礼貌说服的感觉。
